scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-stop.mjs --quiet && concurrently -n API,WEB,WARMUP -c blue,green,gray --kill-others-on-fail=false "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web" "node scripts/dev-warmup.mjs"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && python -m uvicorn kort_api.main:app --app-dir src --reload --reload-dir src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
